# Test Document v0.2.1

This document tests **v0.2.1** link support.

## Basic Links

Visit [Feishu](https://www.feishu.cn) for more info.

## Links with Formatting

This is a **[bold link](https://www.feishu.cn)** and an *[italic link](https://example.com)*.

## Multiple Links

Find info at [Google](https://www.google.com) or [GitHub](https://github.com).

## Mixed Content

This has **bold**, *italic*, `code`, and a [link](https://www.feishu.cn) together.

## End
